GENBU · S4 entitlement gate

offline Ed25519 verify → tier gating. H4. Reuses license core (ed25519_license). No server.

Signed entitlement token

Signed once with the dev private key. This page holds only the public key (forgery is mathematically impossible). Edit any field below to simulate tampering.

Feature gate

FREE — AES-256-GCM encrypt/decrypt, GCF output (always on)
PRO — multi-device key sync · GCF advanced metadata · key rotation locked
